arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe: Real Madrid take RISKY decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid have suffered a string of injury problems this season, but any thoughts that they might wrap Mbappe up in cottonwool for the Intercontinental Cup have been brushed aside, with AS reporting that the France international star will travel with the team to Qatar and is even set to be given minutes. Real Madrid are primed to take a gamble over Kylian Mbappe, despite the former PSG striker suffering a midweek injury against Atalanta.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe rape and sexual assault investigation dropped after police probe
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe was linked with an alleged incident of rape and sexual assault which is said to have taken place during the Real Madrid forward's visit to Sweden in October

arts.ttl: 17-G/A in 19 games this season: Liverpool keen on €85m-rated Barcelona, Real Madrid target
arts.sum: Liverpool are looking to improve their attacking options in the coming months and they have identified the Inter Milan striker Marcus Thuram as a potential option. The 26-year-old French international has done quite well for the Italian club and he has 11 goals and 6 assists in 19 matches across all competitions this season. arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Real Madrid 'planning spectacular double swoop' for Red Devils duo
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly interested in signing Manchester United's defensive duo Lisandro Martinez and Diogo Dalot next year.
Joe Champion has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in LaLiga on Friday, Saturday and Sunday.

arts.ttl: Bellingham the boss: inside Jude’s early evolution at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Bellingham has won the most defensive duels on the team so far (70, two more than Rüdiger) and has the highest number of ball recoveries in the final third—the most dangerous area for opponents—with 14. The English star has become the guiding force for Real Madrid, culminating in his leadership role on the field over the past month and a half.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah contract update: Extension timeline revealed, Virgil van Dijk latest, Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid discussed
arts.sum: Confirmation of Mohamed Salah's contract extension is some time away, though Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold's extensions are on different trajectories.

arts.ttl: VIDEO: Can Vinicius And Bellingham Crack The All-time Real Madrid XI?
arts.sum: In a recently released exclusive Members-only podcast on Patreon, Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete went through the weekly Real Madrid mailbag and answered questions sent in from Real Madrid fans. Listeners and watchers are encouraged to sign up as a Member on Patreon to ensure they don’t miss out on the bonus content that Managing Madrid posts multiple times per week.

arts.ttl: Inside Spain: Thrilling title race, tectonic shifts at Real Madrid and Dani Olmo desperation at Barcelona
arts.sum: Inside Spain is a weekly instalment brought to you by Football España, providing an insight into all of the major stories coming out of the rich and intense climes of La Liga and beyond. While this season looked as if it would be a cake-walk for Real Madrid following the arrival of Kylian Mbappe. arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Los Blancos issue 'hands-off warning' for in-demand attacker
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly not interested in allowing Arda Guler to leave the club anytime soon, despite rumoured interest from Bayer Leverkusen.
